name: iso-42001-ai
description: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 AI Management System compliance server. Provides management system auditing against clauses 4-10, Annex A control evaluation, Annex B risk assessment, policy template generation, certification readiness checking, and crosswalks to EU AI Act. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: audit_management_system
tools.description: Audit an AI management system against ISO/IEC 42001 clauses 4-10.

tools.name: assess_ai_risk
tools.description: Perform ISO 42001 Annex B risk assessment for AI systems.

tools.name: generate_policy_template
tools.description: Generate AI policy documents per ISO 42001 requirements.

tools.name: check_annex_controls
tools.description: Evaluate AI system against ISO 42001 Annex A controls.

tools.name: crosswalk_to_eu_ai_act
tools.description: Map ISO/IEC 42001 clauses and Annex A controls to EU AI Act articles.

tools.name: create_certification_checklist
tools.description: Generate ISO 42001 certification readiness checklist with pass/fail.
